sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_logical (id INT PRIMARY KEY, status BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO test_logical (id, status) VALUES (1, "or"(true, false));
INSERT INTO test_logical (id, status) VALUES (2, "or"(false, false));
UPDATE test_logical SET status = "or"(status, true) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, status FROM test_logical WHERE status = "or"(true, false);
